subcategory: animated canvas waves with glowing effects
use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS products requiring immersive visual first impressions
Product marketing pages needing animated backgrounds to capture user attention
Creative portfolios and dev-tool landing pages featuring GPU-friendly motion
Interactive hero sections with mouse-reactive wave animations
ai_summary: An immersive hero component featuring a canvas-based animated background with glowing wave effects. Includes mouse tracking for interactive parallax-like motion, stat counters for social proof, and animated call-to-action buttons. The component uses Framer Motion for orchestrated entrance animations and is optimized for GPU rendering with responsive design considerations.
